{{Infobox concept
| name = Ruler
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Ruler Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A Ruler is a type of practitioner characterized by their ability to use [[madra]] as a catalyst to manipulate and command [[vital aura]]. Unlike those who manage their own [[madra]], [[Rulers]] exert control over the surrounding environment or specific elements. For example, those following the [[Path of the White Fox]] can utilize light and dream-based [[aura]] to ensnare opponents in illusions. These specialized abilities, known as [[Ruler techniques]], are described as powerful and conquering forces that can influence the very fabric of existence or control natural elements like wind. While these techniques are potent, they often require significant concentration and time to manifest compared to more immediate striking methods. The authority of a Ruler can be so immense that it allows them to force others into submission, inflict intense agony, or strike from unexpected angles without physical movement. Some individuals may also master multiple disciplines, such as combining Ruler and [[Forger techniques]].}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A [[Ruler]] is a soul type characterized by the scepter symbol and bends the powers of heaven and earth.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c1">''Unsouled'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A [[Ruler]] is a type of practitioner or rank mentioned in relation to combat effectiveness.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] was born a [[Ruler]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Ruler]] is a type of technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Ruler]] wears a [[jade]] badge showing a scepter emblem.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Rulers]] are part of the combatants.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Ruler]] is behind the [[Iron Enforcer]] and holds a green-wrapped infant girl.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ruler]] is a technique used by Archlords.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
